descriptionShort: Quesnel Millionaires lose Mowat Cup final to Richmond Sockeyes after winning Peace-Cariboo league title.
descriptionLong: After winning the Peace-Cariboo Junior Hockey League title in a comeback season, the Quesnel Millionaires fell short in their bid for the Mowat Cup, losing to the Richmond Sockeyes. The Mowat Cup represents the pinnacle of success in B.C. Tier II Junior hockey.
